CHAPTER I

The voyage began on a Tuesday. The captain raised the anchor and the ship pulled out of the harbor on a quiet sea.

CHAPTER II

Three days later, a storm gathered on the horizon. The crew battened down the hatches.

CHAPTER III

When the sun rose on the fourth day, the ship was alone on the open ocean. No land in sight.

CHAPTER IV

Provisions were running low. The captain ordered rationing.
